data.description:

Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions ( (AITXD) ) has shared an update.

On April 9, 2026, Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions and its residential subsidiary Robotic Assistance Devices Residential launched a redesigned radcam.ai website centered on the RADCam smart home security device. The updated site is built to guide consumers from discovery through purchase with interactive demonstrations, real-world use scenarios and clearer explanations of features such as Alexa integration and active response capabilities.

The revamped digital experience reflects RAD-R’s emphasis on the expanding residential security segment and evolving consumer behavior, where buyers rely heavily on online research and usability rather than hardware specs alone. By creating a more intuitive, performance-focused platform and complementing its Amazon, Walmart.com, Best Buy and RobotShop distribution, AITX aims to strengthen RADCam’s market positioning and support its potential to become a more meaningful contributor to company revenue over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (AITXD) stock is a Sell with a $0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions stock, see the AITXD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AITXD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AITXD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial fundamentals—large ongoing losses, negative equity, and continued cash burn—despite strong revenue growth. Corporate events are a clear positive (orders, licenses, integrations), but without technical signals and with a loss-driven (negative) P/E and no dividend data, overall risk remains elevated.

To see Spark’s full report on AITXD stock, click here.

More about Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions

Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions, Inc. is a Detroit-based provider of artificial intelligence-driven security and productivity solutions across enterprise, government, transportation, critical infrastructure, education, and healthcare markets. Through subsidiaries including Robotic Assistance Devices and Robotic Assistance Devices Residential, the company offers stationary and mobile autonomous systems and its in-house SARA platform, aiming to cut traditional guarding costs and integrate with leading monitoring software.

The company’s operations, validated by a SOC 2 Type 2 audit, target the nearly $50 billion U.S. security and guarding services industry via a Solutions-as-a-Service model. Its technologies are deployed with a growing pipeline that includes more than 35 Fortune 500 companies, supporting recurring revenue opportunities and positioning AITX as a notable player in AI-enabled security and automation workflows.

data.title: MEDIROM Extends Loan Maturity with Kufu to April 30, 2026
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies ( (MRM) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 31, 2026, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. signed a memorandum of understanding with Kufu Company Holdings Inc. to extend the maturity date of a deemed loan first agreed on January 30, 2026. The repayment deadline for principal and interest was pushed from March 31 to April 30, 2026, with all interest accrued through March 31 becoming immediately due, while all other terms of the original loan arrangements remained in force.

Under the updated terms, MEDIROM must repay principal and continuing interest by April 30, 2026, after which no further interest will accrue if repayment is completed on time. The extension offers the company short-term financing flexibility but underscores near-term liquidity obligations that stakeholders will watch closely as the new due date approaches.

The most recent analyst rating on (MRM) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies stock, see the MRM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MRM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MRM is a Neutral.

The overall stock score is primarily influenced by financial performance and technical analysis. While the company shows strong revenue growth, profitability and liquidity challenges are significant concerns. The technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, but the stock appears undervalued based on its P/E ratio.

To see Spark’s full report on MRM stock, click here.

More about MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies

MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc., based in Tokyo, is a foreign private issuer listed in the United States and operates in the healthcare and wellness sector. The company provides technology-enabled health services in Japan, positioning itself within the broader digital and preventive healthcare market.

Noah Holdings ( (NOAH) ) has issued an announcement.

Noah Holdings Limited reported in an April 9, 2026 filing that its issued ordinary share count on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange remained unchanged at 337,233,937 shares as of April 7, 2026, with no treasury shares outstanding. The disclosure also detailed a series of American depositary share repurchases conducted on the New York Stock Exchange between December 23, 2025 and January 27, 2026 under a June 12, 2025 shareholder mandate, with the repurchased shares earmarked for cancellation, signaling ongoing capital management efforts without altering the current issued share base.

The company’s Next Day Disclosure Return consolidates multiple small daily buybacks of ADSs, each representing ordinary shares, at prices mostly just above US$2 per ADS. While these repurchases are modest relative to Noah’s total equity, they indicate continued deployment of buyback authorization to enhance shareholder value and fine-tune its capital structure, yet with no immediate impact on the number of listed shares in Hong Kong as of early April 2026.

data.title: Ørsted AGM backs 2025 accounts, skips dividend and refreshes board
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Orsted ( (DOGEF) ) has provided an announcement.

Ørsted’s shareholders approved the audited 2025 annual report at the company’s annual general meeting and backed the board’s proposal not to pay a dividend for the year, retaining earnings after a period of significant investment in renewables. The meeting discharged the board and executive management from liability, endorsed the 2025 remuneration report and 2026 board pay, and re-elected PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditor.

Chair Lene Skole and Deputy Chair Andrew Brown were reappointed, while two directors were re-elected and three new members joined the board, refreshing governance as Ørsted executes its growth strategy. Shareholders also authorised the board to acquire treasury shares and approved the use of English for general meeting materials, moves that may enhance capital management flexibility and improve accessibility for the company’s international investor base.

More about Orsted

Ørsted is a Denmark-headquartered renewable energy company and global leader in developing, constructing, and operating offshore wind farms, with a core focus on Europe. The group has more than 18 GW of installed renewable capacity across Europe, Asia Pacific, and North America, spanning offshore and onshore wind, solar, energy storage, bioenergy plants, and energy trading, and reported 2025 operating profit of DKK 25.1 billion.

For an in-depth examination of DOGEF stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Binhai Investment Sets Timetable for 2025 Final Dividend and AGM Eligibility
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Binhai Investment Co ( (HK:2886) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Binhai Investment Company Limited has proposed a final dividend of HK$0.0836 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, pending shareholder approval at its annual general meeting scheduled for 8 May 2026. The dividend is expected to be paid on or about 10 June 2026, offering investors a cash return tied to the company’s 2025 performance.

To facilitate voting at the AGM, the register of members will be closed from 5 to 8 May 2026, with 4 May set as the deadline for share transfers to qualify for meeting attendance and voting rights. For entitlement to the final dividend, the register will be closed from 14 to 19 May 2026, with 11 May as the last cum-dividend trading day and 12 May marking the ex-dividend date, setting a clear timetable for shareholders to manage their positions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2886) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Binhai Investment Co stock, see the HK:2886 Stock Forecast page.

More about Binhai Investment Co

Binhai Investment Company Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2886. The firm operates in the investment sector, with its shares traded on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors.

WingArc1st Inc. ( (JP:4432) ) has shared an update.

WingArc1st Inc. has reported a change in its major shareholders following an internal reorganization within the Toshiba Group, in which Toshiba Digital Solutions Corporation was absorbed by Toshiba Corporation. As a result, Toshiba Corporation has inherited Toshiba Digital Solutions’ 13.24% stake in WingArc1st, becoming the company’s second-largest shareholder while maintaining an existing director dispatch and sales partnership.

The transaction is a group-level restructuring rather than a market-driven share transfer, and WingArc1st states it does not expect any impact on its management structure or business performance. For stakeholders, the move effectively consolidates the existing capital, personnel, and business relationships under Toshiba Corporation, reinforcing continuity in strategic collaboration without altering the company’s governance balance or day-to-day operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4432) stock is a Hold with a Yen2767.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on WingArc1st Inc. stock, see the JP:4432 Stock Forecast page.

More about WingArc1st Inc.

WingArc1st Inc. is a Japan-based software and cloud services provider that partners with major industrial groups to deliver data-driven solutions. The company collaborates closely with large technology and manufacturing enterprises, leveraging sales partnerships to expand its market reach and deepen integration of its products into customers’ digital operations.

BOKU ( (GB:BOKU) ) has shared an announcement.

Boku Inc. has repurchased 25,000 of its ordinary shares on AIM at a volume-weighted average price of 166 pence per share, with Investec Bank executing the buyback. The shares will be held in treasury under Diagonal Nominees, reflecting ongoing capital management and potentially signalling confidence in the company’s valuation.

Following this transaction, Boku’s issued share capital remains at 303,738,417 common shares, of which 6,498,419 are now held in treasury, leaving 297,239,998 voting rights in circulation. The updated figure provides a new reference point for investors assessing disclosure thresholds under UK transparency rules and may marginally enhance earnings per share for existing shareholders.

data.title: Sino Biopharm Wins Early Greater Bay Area Nod for Naldemedine in Opioid-Induced Constipation
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sino Biopharmaceutical ( (HK:1177) ) has shared an update.

Sino Biopharmaceutical’s subsidiary Chia Tai Tianqing has secured early approval in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area to market Naldemedine, an innovative, orally administered selective peripheral opioid receptor antagonist for opioid‑induced constipation. The drug, already approved in the U.S., EU, Japan and several Chinese territories, is backed by phase 3 data showing significantly faster and higher bowel movement response rates versus placebo.

The authorization under the expanded “Hong Kong and Macao Medicine and Equipment Connect” policy makes Naldemedine one of the first innovative medicines to enter the Greater Bay Area via this channel, enhancing access for cancer patients suffering from opioid‑induced constipation. With exclusive mainland China marketing rights from Shionogi and a national application accepted by the NMPA, Sino Biopharmaceutical aims to leverage its commercialization network to strengthen its positioning in supportive cancer care and expand the drug’s reach across China.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1177) stock is a Buy with a HK$8.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sino Biopharmaceutical stock, see the HK:1177 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sino Biopharmaceutical

Sino Biopharmaceutical Limited is a Hong Kong–listed pharmaceutical group focused on innovative and generic medicines, with a strong presence in China’s healthcare market. Through its subsidiary Chia Tai Tianqing Pharmaceutical Group, the company develops and commercializes treatments targeting major therapeutic areas, including oncology and pain management–related complications.
